attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.APPLICATION_ID,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.ID_FLEX_CODE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.ID_FLEX_NUM,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.SEGMENT_NAME,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.CREATION_DATE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.CREATED_BY,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.SEGMENT_NUM,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.APPLICATION_COLUMN_INDEX_FLAG,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.ENABLED_FLAG,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.REQUIRED_FLAG,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.DISPLAY_FLAG,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.DISPLAY_SIZE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.SECURITY_ENABLED_FLAG,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.MAXIMUM_DESCRIPTION_LEN,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.CONCATENATION_DESCRIPTION_LEN,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.RANGE_CODE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.DEFAULT_TYPE,
 REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(DEFAULT_VALUE,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') DEFAULT_VALUE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.RUNTIME_PROPERTY_FUNCTION,
 REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(ADDITIONAL_WHERE_CLAUSE,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ADDITIONAL_WHERE_CLAUSE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS 
WHERE
 CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS.GES_UPDATE_DATE > to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
